channel.title: project on adhyaksa
channel.description: Recent content in project on adhyaksa

item.title: All About Manchester United Performance Last Season
item.description: Table of Content Motivation Approach and Tools The Findings Insight Summary Recommendation Motivation Manchester United has experienced their worst performance, where they only managed to collect 58 points (16 wins, 10 draws, and 12 losses) by the end of the 2021/2022 season—the lowest number of points accumulated by the club since the establishment of the Premier League format in 1992. This is in stark contrast to the previous season, where they could finish second and collect 73 points (21 wins, 11 draws, and 6 losses).
